content:
A keyword conveys specific rules to its card. If a card gains multiple instances of a keyword, additional instances have no effect unless followed by a number (e.g. Hinder X, Retaliate X), in which case numbers are added together.

Keywords in the game: Alliance, Assault, Form, Guard, Hinder X, Incite X, Linked (Card Title), Overkill, Patrol, Peril, Permanent, Piercing, Quickstrike, Ranged, Requirement (Resources), Restricted, Retaliate X, Setup, Stalwart, Steady, Surge, Team-Up, Teamwork (Trait), Temporary, Toughness, Uses (X 'type'), Victory X, Villainous.
